content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Updated `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` to remove the lingering `final_review_planner` entry from the persisted `last_stage_resolution_snapshot`, leaving the tracked run snapshot aligned with the planner-free final-review schema. The active run snapshot already had no planner field; the remaining planner mentions in `run.json` are now only historical amendment text, not serialized snapshot state.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the checked-in `aro-1` run snapshot for any remaining serialized `final_review_planner` fields in active and last stage-resolution snapshots
2. [Completed] Patch `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` so persisted final-review snapshot state contains reviewers plus arbiter only
3. [Completed] Validate the updated snapshot shape and confirm legacy planner-field deserialization coverage still passes

## Validation Evidence

- `rg -n '"final_review_planner"' .ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` returned no matches after the patch, confirming the snapshot field is no longer serialized there.
- `jq empty .ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` passed, confirming the edited snapshot remains valid JSON.
- `cargo test stage_resolution_snapshot_ignores_legacy_final_review_planner_field -- --nocapture` passed, confirming backward-compatible reading of old snapshots with the legacy planner field still works.

## Outstanding Risks

- I did not rerun the full repository gates in this remediation pass (`cargo test`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, `nix build`).
- `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/journal.ndjson` and some checked-in history artifacts still contain historical planner references from earlier review rounds; I did not rewrite that audit history in this pass.
